summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Métro-Taxi platform. Backend APIs fully functional after fixing ObjectId serialization issue. Frontend core features working well with minor navigation timeout issue.

resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Created response objects before MongoDB insert to avoid ObjectId contamination

minor_bugs.issue: Navigation timeout after logout click - takes longer than expected to redirect to home page
minor_bugs.workaround: Logout functionality works, just slower redirect

minor_bugs.issue: Vehicle type dropdown selection has timing issues in automated testing
minor_bugs.note: Manual testing shows dropdown works correctly

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and CTA buttons
Pricing section displays all 3 subscription plans (24h, 1 week, 1 month)
Admin login with admin@metrotaxi.fr / admin123 successful
Admin dashboard loads with statistics cards
Driver management tab shows drivers list
Users management tab displays users table
User registration form accessible and functional
All backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Subscription plans API returns correct data
User and driver registration APIs working
